query: Could you propose a one-week travel itinerary for 4 people, leaving from Seattle and heading to Florida from March 17th to March 23rd, 2022? We plan to visit 3 different cities in Florida. Our budget is set at $14,700. We require accommodations that allow parties, and we prefer to rent entire rooms. We also would prefer to avoid driving ourselves during this trip.

plan.transportation: Flight F3508009, from Seattle to Orlando, 08:07 - 16:29

plan.attraction: Universal Orlando Resort;The Wheel at ICON Park;Madame Tussauds Orlando;Ripley's Believe It or Not!;The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Diagon Alley;The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Hogsmeade;The Simpsons Ride;Harry Potter and the Forbidden Journey;
plan.accommodation: BKLYN Brownstone- Glam Getaway!, 287.0, Entire home/apt, No pets & No visitors, 3.0, 2, 3.0, Orlando

plan.attraction: SeaWorld Orlando;Fun Spot America Theme Parks;SEA LIFE Orlando Aquarium;WonderWorks Orlando;Magical Midway Arcade & SlingShot;Orlando Starflyer;
